svg.title: Kafka RBAC authorization model
svg.desc: Shows principals, ACL resources, and the authorization decision flow for producers and consumers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Kafka authenticate a producer with mTLS?')
sendPrompt('How does Kafka authenticate a consumer with mTLS?')
sendPrompt('What can a Kafka admin principal do?')
sendPrompt('What Kafka operations does a Topic ACL cover?')
sendPrompt('Why does a consumer need a Group ACL in Kafka?')
sendPrompt('What is the Cluster ACL used for in Kafka?')
sendPrompt('What is a TransactionalId ACL for?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a Kafka ACL check passes?')
sendPrompt('What error does Kafka return on ACL denial?')

svg.text: No matching ACL = DENY. Every permission must be explicitly granted.
